name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖Original Leather【New】GG Marmont Small Quilted Shoulder Bag. The GG Marmont chain-link mini shoulder bag features a structured yet soft silhouette and a large flap closure with double-G metal hardware. The sliding chain shoulder strap offers versatile carrying options, allowing you to switch between shoulder and handbag styles. Features wavy quilted leather with a GG logo on the back. Burgundy quilted V-shaped leather, vintage gold metal hardware double-G, open interior pocket, adjustable chain shoulder strap (60 cm high). Also functions as a crossbody bag. Zip closure with extended pull, weight: approx. 0.394 kg.

The sliding chain shoulder strap offers versatile carrying options, allowing you to switch between shoulder and handbag styles. Features wavy quilted leather with a GG logo on the back. Burgundy quilted V-shaped leather, vintage gold metal hardware double-G, open interior pocket, adjustable chain shoulder strap (60 cm high). Also functions as a crossbody bag. Zip closure with extended pull, weight: approx. 0.394 kg.
Model: 447632.
Size: 13(L) x 24(W) x 7cm(D)
Color: Burgundy/Original Leather.
Microfiber lining
Italian Creation
Model height 178 cm
Max capacity: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods, small wallet, and lipstick
